skills.name: /daily
skills.description: Runs the full daily batch: pulls ideation queue, picks top-N ideas, drafts across platforms, scores, and schedules into Postsyncer.

skills.name: /ideate
skills.description: Pulls from scraper + validator, merges with manual ideas, returns a ranked queue with pillar tags and proof points.

skills.name: /write
skills.description: Drafts a post in Vishal's voice. Accepts an idea + target platform. Enforces pillar, funnel, and proof-point constraints.

skills.name: /hook
skills.description: Generates 5 hook variants per draft. Scores each against the top-100 engagement sample from the scraper.

skills.name: /score
skills.description: Rates a draft 0–10 across hook strength, proof density, CTA clarity, and voice fit. Flags anything below 6.

skills.name: /asset
skills.description: Generates a PDF / checklist / template pack for a funnel keyword. Uploads to Vercel Blob and links it in the asset library.

skills.name: /schedule
skills.description: Pushes approved drafts to Postsyncer with per-platform slot timing. Retries on rate-limit errors.

skills.name: /engage
skills.description: Runs the comment / repost / DM budget for the day against the Watchlist. Uses Claude-in-Chrome MCP for no-API platforms.

skills.name: /revise
skills.description: Accepts human feedback on a draft and rewrites. Maintains pillar + funnel constraints.

skills.name: /voice-check
skills.description: Cross-references a draft against voice/ library samples. Flags AI-tells (em-dashes, 'delve', 'leverage', etc).

skills.name: /report
skills.description: Weekly pillar-mix and engagement budget report. Posts summary to Slack.

skills.name: /reclaim
skills.description: Re-engages inbound DMs that went quiet for >72h. Sends a single contextual follow-up, then stops.
